generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorAndSteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical component responsible for controlling vehicle speed and direction through motor and steering mechanisms."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller managing motor commands for precise speed regulation of the autonomous vehicle."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer executing control algorithms and interfacing with actuators for real-time processing."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor detecting objects in vehicle proximity and generating point clouds for perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PointCloudDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera capturing 3D environmental data for object detection and spatial mapping."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance OnboardVehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors measuring ego vehicle state including speed and steering angle for state monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance PointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OnboardVehicleStateSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based clustering model processing raw point cloud data for object detection and spatial segmentation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudDataProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter-based tracking model maintaining object trajectories using sensor data inputs."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control logic computing lead vehicle detection and following speed."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed point cloud data representing detected objects and environmental features."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series object tracking data containing detected objects' positions and velocities."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state including speed and steering angle for monitoring and control."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance TimeseriesReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Generated time-series reports of vehicle state and object tracks for analysis and diagnostics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudDataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing DBSCAN clustering for point cloud data processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudVisualizationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing Kalman filter-based object tracking using sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud/remote hardware executing ISO 15622 compliant ACC control logic offloading compute from Jetson."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveCruiseControlService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization UI component rendering real-time data including object tracks and driving path."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    base:isContainedIn UserEntity
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reporting frontend generating human-readable time-series reports from stored data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ControlPanelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote control panel enabling operator to enable/disable ACC and adjust parameters via ROS2/Wi-Fi."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
    base:isContainedIn UserEntity
]

// C6: Services
instance PointCloudVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service displaying processed point cloud data."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Object tracking service maintaining object trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system computing lead vehicle detection and following speed with compute offloading to cloud hardware."
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service displaying real-time ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeseriesReportInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control panel enabling operator to manage ACC functionality including emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Transparent decision-making visualization showing lead vehicle detection and speed adjustments for trust-building."
]

instance TimeseriesReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports of vehicle state and object tracks enabling performance analysis and troubleshooting."
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time detection and tracking of lead vehicles for ACC functionality."
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic speed adjustment based on lead vehicle detection and desired following distance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator-controlled actions including enabling/disabling ACC and triggering emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Digital Twin Entities
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Hosts resource-specific functionality including point cloud clustering and actuation interfaces."
    base:contains MotorAndSteeringServo
    base:contains VedderElectronicSpeedController
    base:contains JetsonOrinNano
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:contains IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    base:contains OnboardVehicleStateSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Handles data collection, control logic (ACC), and reporting via cloud/remote hardware."
    base:contains PointCloudDataProcessingEnabler
    base:contains ObjectTrackingEnabler
    base:contains ACCComputationEnabler
    base:contains ReportingEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Manages user interfaces including 3D visualization and control panel."
    base:contains VisualizationEnabler
    base:contains ControlPanelEnabler
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Facilitates data translation between Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity."
    base:contains DataTranslationService
]

// C12: Digital Twin System
instance AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Decentralized digital twin system implementing ISO 23247 entity-based architecture with modular ROS2 packages."
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity
    base:contains UserEntity
    base:contains CrossSystemEntity
]

// C13: Physical System
instance AutonomousVehiclePhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle with three hardware layers for steering, autonomy, and sensor integration."
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity
]

// C14: Data Translation Service
instance DataTranslationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service facilitating data translation between different system components."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTranslationInsight
    base:isContainedIn CrossSystemEntity
]

instance DataTranslationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing transparent data translation between system entities."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the digital twin (DT) to the physical twin (PT) include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the DT's ACC system and sent to the PT for actuation.
  - **Emergency braking commands** transmitted to the PT to halt the vehicle in critical situations.
  - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed) sent to the PT for real-time control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time-scale involves:
  - **Real-time synchronization** between PT and DT with a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (as per 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication).
  - **Clock synchronization** between components with an accuracy of **100 ms** to ensure event ordering and data integrity.
  - **Perception cycles** for object tracking and state updates (e.g., ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks) occurring at high frequency to maintain real-time responsiveness."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Physical Twin (PT)**: The 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle with onboard sensors and actuators.
  - **Digital Twin System (DTS)**: Composed of three main entities (Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, User Entity) and a Cross-System Entity for data translation.
  - **Communication**: ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP) for inter-entity communication between PT and DT.
  - **Deployment**: The PT runs on the vehicle's onboard hardware (Jetson Orin Nano), while the DT Entity and User Entity are deployed on external hardware (likely cloud or edge servers)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across multiple lifecycle stages of the physical twin:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation facility for validating ACC algorithms and system requirements.
  - **Operation Phase**: Deployed for real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance during vehicle operation.
  The DT covers the **as-manufactured** and **as-operated** phases of the physical twin, with potential extensions to **as-designed** phases for simulation-based testing."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity considerations include:
  - **High-Fidelity Models**: The DT uses real-time sensor data (LiDAR, depth camera) and advanced algorithms (Kalman filtering) to ensure accurate object tracking and vehicle state estimation.
  - **Verification**: Compliance with ISO 15622 for ACC functionality and 3GPP 22.185 for latency requirements.
  - **Validation**: Real-world testing of the DT's ability to offload computations, manage ACC remotely, and maintain low latency.
  - **Uncertainty**: Potential errors in object detection (e.g., LiDAR noise) and clock synchronization (100 ms tolerance) are mitigated through robust algorithms and hardware redundancy.
  - **Safety Validation**: The DT is designed to handle critical operations (e.g., emergency braking) with fail-safe mechanisms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
  - **Network Protocols**: Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP) for inter-entity communication between PT and DT.
  - **Middleware**: ROS2 for intra-entity communication within the PT and DT.
  - **Data Serialization**: Data translation component serializes and aligns message types for seamless communication.
  - **Latency Requirements**: End-to-end latency ≤ 100 ms (as per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the onboard Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Likely deployed on external hardware (e.g., cloud or edge servers) to offload computation.
  - **User Entity**: Deployed on a remote device (e.g., laptop, workstation) for visualization and control.
  - **Data Storage**: External SQL database for storing vehicle state and object track data."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The digital twin supports **limited horizontal integration** with external systems:
  - **Simulation Tools**: **MATLAB/Simulink** integrates with the **Digital Twin Entity** for **perception algorithm prototyping** (e.g., point cloud clustering).
  - **Fleet Management**: The **SQL database** and **ROS2 architecture** are designed for **scalability** to support **cloud-based fleet coordination** (as mentioned in the introduction but not implemented in this case study).
  - **External APIs**: Future work may integrate **OPC UA** (IEC 62541) for **industrial IoT compatibility**, though not deployed in this instance."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT follows the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework (used as a reference architecture with adaptations).
  - **ISO 15622**: Standard for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) functionality.
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Service requirements for Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication (latency constraints).
  - **OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA)**: Potentially used for data translation (not implemented in this case but referenced in the standard)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The digital twin incorporates **safety-critical design** but lacks explicit **security protocols**:
  - **Safety**:
    - **Emergency braking** implemented via **remote commands** (Control Panel UI) with **real-time actuation** (≤100 ms).
    - **ACC compliance** with **ISO 15622** ensures **safe following distance** logic.
    - **Clock synchronization (±100 ms)** prevents **race conditions** in distributed control.
  - **Security**:
    - **Not explicitly addressed** in the document. No mention of **user authentication**, **data encryption**, or **cybersecurity hardening** (e.g., firewall rules, secure Wi-Fi).
    - **Wi-Fi communication** assumed but not described as **secure** (e.g., WPA2/WPA3, TLS)."
]
